description: Declared release context for the pediatric CDS research prototype (EPR0-T1, FR-WP0-01/02, D4). Governs which intended uses, territories, and channels THIS PLATFORM currently claims for itself. This is a scope declaration, not a source-level rights clearance — a rights_record (schemas/rights/rights_record.schema.json, vendored in EPR0-T2) decides what a specific source permits; this file decides what the product is currently allowed to do with anything it holds. Every future content_reuse_assessment is checked for CONTAINMENT within this context (the assessment's requested use/territory/channel must be a subset of what is declared permitted here) — this file is never widened to fit a request.

intended_uses.vocabulary_source: docs/project_plans/research/research_foundry_rights_governance_spec_v1.0/Research_Foundry_Source_Reuse_and_Rights_Governance_Spec_v1.0.md §5.2 (Intended-use classes) — every string below is copied verbatim from that list, never invented.

territory.notes: Single-tenant internal research deployment. No cross-border hosting, distribution, or localization is claimed.

channel.notes: Browser-local research prototype plus its mirror REST API, reachable only inside the internal engineering environment. No hosted multi-tenant, public, or partner-facing channel is in scope.

notes: commercial:false is load-bearing: any fixture that asserts a commercial-shaped use (commercial:true, or an intended_uses value drawn from the not_permitted set above) against this context must fail containment. This file grants no clearance to any source and creates no rights_record — see rights/rights-records.json and schemas/rights/rights_record.schema.json for that axis.
